summary: Iteration 5: Tested three new features — Stay Logged In (remember_me JWT), AppState foreground refresh, and Daily 1PM PT NDX scheduler. All 8 backend tests pass and all 8 frontend checks verified.
critical_code_review_comments: create_token() does NOT include 'iat' in JWT payload — only 'sub', 'is_admin', 'exp'. This is technically fine since PyJWT still validates 'exp', but including 'iat' is best practice (RFC 7519) and helps downstream debugging/inspection.
useAppForeground hook is correctly attached in all 3 tabs (index.tsx, alerts.tsx, news.tsx). news.tsx only refreshes preflight data on foreground, not AI sentiment — minor, acceptable.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_reclassify_* user created during non-admin reclassify test (registered user).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stay Logged In fully verified: (1) remember_me=false → ~7-day token, (2) remember_me=true → ~90-day token, (3) token expiry diff matches ~83 days. Admin reclassify-by-ndx-close: 200 with useful response keys (refactored helper still works). NDX scheduler log confirmed: 'NDX daily scheduler: next reclassify at 2026-05-09 13:00 PDT, sleeping 3.3h'. Frontend: checkbox below Sign In button, green and checked by default, toggles on tap, login flow works end-to-end.

TestRememberMeTokenExpiry.test_remember_me_7day_less_than_90day: PASS — exp diff ~83 days as expected

FrontendUI.checkbox_visible_below_sign_in_button: PASS — toggle at Y=574, submit at Y=512
FrontendUI.checkbox_toggles_on_tap: PASS — HTML diff confirms active/inactive class toggle
FrontendUI.checkbox_hidden_on_register_tab: PASS — rememberRow only rendered when isLogin=true
FrontendUI.login_with_checkbox_checked_works: PASS — dashboard loads, quotes visible, no errors
FrontendUI.ndx_scheduler_log_on_startup: PASS — 'NDX daily scheduler: next reclassify at 2026-05-09 13:00 PDT' found in backend.err.log
